“What's behind the door”

A drop is not a
post. It's access.

01

Early songs, first ears

Every record in your hands before it hits streaming. Demos, loosies, the stuff that never makes the album. You hear it while it's still warm.

01
02

Movement breakdowns

The Jaywalk and every move after it, step by step. Learn the thing the internet only copied.

03

Private sessions

Live, small room, real questions. Dance, faith, music, business. Off the feed.

First seat to every in-person room he opens in the city. Members walk in, everyone else waits.

Member-only drops

Merch, tickets, collabs that never touch the public feed. If you're in, you're first.

“Owned, not borrowed”

Child of God, first.
Artist second.

Not a Christian-rap costume, and not a secret. He came home to his faith on purpose, out loud, and everything he builds now runs on it. Move with him, you move with that too.

Galatians 2:20 · the rebuild, in real time
